case_title: JOSE FELIPE CASCO VS. OCEAN TAQUERIA 2, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASCO, JOSE FELIPE AS TO DEFENDANT OCEAN TAQUERIA 2, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, MARIA SOCORRO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNER OF OCEAN TAQUERIA 2, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, HERIBERTO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNER OF OCEAN TAQUERIA 2, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, MARIA GUADALUPE DBA LA FRONTERA #2 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASCO, JOSE FELIPE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCEAN TAQUERIA 2, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, MARIA SOCORRO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNER OF OCEAN TAQUERIA 2, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, HERIBERTO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNER OF OCEAN TAQUERIA 2, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, MARIA GUADALUPE DBA LA FRONTERA #2 $2,661.01 PRINCIPAL, $10.41 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,896.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
